## Type
- [ ] New training asset (`trainings/<file>.md`)
- [ ] Iteration on existing training
- [ ] Process / workflow change
- [ ] Other

## Checklist (for training asset PRs)
- [ ] File lives under `/trainings/` and uses `_template.md` front-matter.
- [ ] `request_issue` front-matter links to the request issue.
- [ ] Plan was approved on the request issue (`state:plan-approved`).
- [ ] SME has been assigned as a reviewer.
- [ ] Learning outcomes match those approved in the plan.
